name: Threads Automation
description: Battle-tested playbook for Threads (threads.com) browser automation via CDP. Covers feed, like, reply, repost, share, create post, search, follow/unfollow, and profile viewing.

steps: Find Like button within post: svg[aria-label='Like']
Verify: svg[aria-label='Unlike'] now exists in that post
guards: Post must not already be liked

steps: Find Reply button in post: svg[aria-label='Reply']
Wait 1.5s for reply dialog to open
Find textbox: div[role='textbox'] with placeholder 'Reply to {username}...'
Type reply via browser_fill_form with ~80ms delay
Find Post button in dialog and click via browser_js
Find Repost button in post: svg[aria-label='Repost']
Wait 1s for repost menu to appear
guards: Post must not already be reposted

steps: Find Repost button in post: svg[aria-label='Repost']
Wait 1s for repost menu to appear
Wait for quote dialog to open
Find Share button in post: svg[aria-label='Share']
Wait 1s for share menu to appear
Click Create button in sidebar: svg[aria-label='Create'] via parent element
Wait 1.5s for create dialog to open
Find textbox: div[role='textbox'] with placeholder 'What's new?'
Type post content via browser_fill_form with ~60ms delay
Optionally attach media, GIF, emoji, poll, or location
create_post.why: Create dialog offers: Attach media, Add a GIF, Add an emoji, Add a poll, Attach text, Add a location, Add to thread, Reply options

steps: Wait 1s for search page to load
Type query via browser_fill_form with ~100ms delay
Extract profile results from a[href^='/@'] links
Find Follow button: div[role='button'] with text 'Follow'
Find Following button: div[role='button'] with text 'Following'
Wait 1s for unfollow confirmation to appear
Verify logged in (check for Home icon)
Extract visible posts from div[data-pressable-container='true'] elements
Get username from a[href^='/@'] span within each post
Scroll down to load more content
Extract profile bio and thread count

errors.context: Any action when not logged in
errors.solution: Log in manually first. ScreenHand cannot bypass login. Threads uses Instagram login.

errors.context: Too many likes, reposts, or replies
errors.solution: Wait 15-30 minutes. Threads shares rate limits with Instagram.

errors.error: Repost menu item text is 'RepostRepost' not 'Repost'
errors.context: Threads renders icon + text together causing doubled text in textContent
errors.solution: Match on textContent containing 'RepostRepost' for Repost option, 'QuoteQuote' for Quote option.

errors.error: Search sidebar doesn't open search input
errors.context: Clicking Search SVG in sidebar navigates instead of opening inline search
errors.solution: Navigate directly to threads.com/search to get the search input.

errors.error: Follow button is a div[role='button'] not a button element
errors.context: Threads uses div role=button for Follow/Following
errors.solution: Query div[role='button'] in addition to button elements.

errors.error: Frontmost app switches to VS Code when approving tool calls
errors.solution: Use CDP browser tools (browser_js, browser_human_click, browser_fill_form) — they work regardless of which app is frontmost.

safety: Use browser_fill_form with 50-100ms delays for typing
tool_preferences: browser_human_click — for Like, Repost, Share, Follow buttons
browser_fill_form — for reply/post textboxes and search input
browser_js — for finding elements by textContent, clicking menu items, extracting data
browser_navigate — for page navigation (works in background)

steps.description: Scroll down to see more posts
Wait for new posts to load
